title: docker:// transport doesn't work as an unprivileged user
body:
This happens because `/etc/docker` doesn't have `a+rx` so you get `EPERM` when trying to resolve `/etc/docker/certs.d/docker.io` rather than `ENOENT`.

```
% ./skopeo copy docker://busybox oci:busybox
FATA[0000] Error initializing source docker://busybox:latest: open /etc/docker/certs.d/docker.io: permission denied
```

comments.body: Sorry, this is a `containers/image` bug, and I already opened a bug for it. containers/image#297
